scripts.pub: yarn pub:cadre-cli && yarn pub:cadre-core && yarn pub:cadre-provider
scripts.pub:cadre-cli: cd packages/cadre-cli && yarn clean && yarn build && npx bumpp --no-push --no-commit --no-tag --no-git-check -y && yarn npm publish --access public
scripts.pub:cadre-core: cd packages/cadre-core && yarn clean && yarn build && npx bumpp --no-push --no-commit --no-tag --no-git-check -y && yarn npm publish --access public
scripts.pub:cadre-provider: cd packages/cadre-provider && yarn clean && yarn build && npx bumpp --no-push --no-commit --no-tag --no-git-check -y && yarn npm publish --access public
